initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count,
    AVG(op.payment_value) AS avg_payment_per_order,
    CASE 
        WHEN (MAX(julianday(o.order_purchase_timestamp)) - MIN(julianday(o.order_purchase_timestamp))) / 7.0 < 7 
        THEN 1.0 
        ELSE (MAX(julianday(o.order_purchase_timestamp)) - MIN(julianday(o.order_purchase_timestamp))) / 7.0 
    END AS lifespan_weeks
FROM orders o
JOIN order_payments op ON o.order_id = op.order_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_unique_id
ORDER BY avg_payment_per_order DESC
LIMIT 3;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count,
    AVG(op.payment_value) AS avg_payment_per_order,
    CASE 
        WHEN (MAX(julianday(o.order_purchase_timestamp)) - MIN(julianday(o.order_purchase_timestamp))) / 7 < 7 THEN 1.0
        ELSE (MAX(julianday(o.order_purchase_timestamp)) - MIN(julianday(o.order_purchase_timestamp))) / 7
    END AS lifespan_weeks
FROM orders o
JOIN order_payments op ON o.order_id = op.order_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_unique_id
ORDER BY avg_payment_per_order DESC
LIMIT 3;
